title: Hunger Overhaul Reborn
description: A Revival of the Hunger Overhaul mod.
body:
Hunger Overhaul Reborn is a survival rebalance mod focused on hunger, food, crops, tools, and animals.  

> **Alpha Notice**  
> This mod is in early alpha and has only been minimally tested. Bugs are guaranteed—please report them if you find any.  
> This is my first published mod since the old META-INF days!  

---

## Features

- **passive hunger use**
- **Food fully rebalanced** with Well Fed and Hungry status effects.
- - **Stackable container foods** - Bowl foods, honey bottles, and milk buckets now stack (configurable stack sizes)
- **Difficulty-based crop growth** - Growth rates scale with world difficulty:
  - Peaceful: 100% (full vanilla speed)
  - Easy: 67% of vanilla speed
  - Normal: 50% of vanilla speed  
  - Hard: 34% of vanilla speed
- **Crops**
  - **Serene Seasons integration** - Respects seasonal fertility and growth rates
  - Grows only in daylight.  
  - Right-click harvest automatically replants.  
  - Breaking crops drops only planted seeds.  
- **Hoes**
  - Dirt near water tills normally.  
  - Grass without water converts to dirt with a 20% chance to drop seeds.  
  - Tall grass no longer drops seeds.  
- **Bone meal scaling** – success chance depends on difficulty.
- **Animals** – breeding and growth are slower.
- **Hunger** if you run out of hunger, you die.

### I may be missing features from the original, I'm open to being told I've missed something
---

## Disclaimer

**Inspired by the original [Hunger Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hunger-overhaul)** by *iguanaman*, later maintained by *ProgWML6, Parker8283, squeek502,* and *Alexbegt*.  

This is a **from-scratch re-implementation** with completely original code and **no affiliation** with the original creators.
